title: roldana albonervia
intro: Roldana albonervia, also known as Mexican mint, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Roldana albonervia include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in herbal remedies such as salves and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
